string.name: banner_desc
string.value: Based on a brand-new component design, create a more immersive visual experience for applications and a more intelligent interactive experience.

string.name: sample_1_desc
string.value: Explain principles, MO video, design language introduction.

string.name: sample_2_desc
string.value: Press elastic feedback, press point light source, material flowing light, three-level introduction, inverse color.

string.name: sample_3_title
string.value: Immersive Light for App First View

string.name: sample_3_desc
string.value: Based on Navigation&Tabs components provided by HDS, create a refreshed first-view effect.

string.name: sample_4_desc
string.value: Through adaptive floating navigation and MiniBar configuration, quickly configure multi-device effects, facilitating user quick operations.

string.name: sample_5_desc
string.value: On widescreen devices, based on intelligent perception of user grip, provide intelligent interaction experience.

string.name: sample_6_desc
string.value: Based on diverse customization effects, provide rich toolbar application scenarios, creating immersive operation experience.

string.name: alert_msg
string.value: Switch between left and right hand grips to easily experience the smart gesture control and intelligent interaction.

string.name: alert_desc
string.value: *The feature is not supported on some models. Actual experience may vary.

string.name: gesture_reason
string.value: Your hand movement status needs to be obtained to implement hand-based operations
